More automated and useful AI features like this @cjpedregal - maybe weekly recap brief?

@meetgranola mcp, live in @Amplitude_HQ

top10TweetsByEngagement.text: @Bonecondor @JamesPeyer @maxmarchione @superpower @cremieuxrecueil @ItsPeptime incredible vibes and a rare not-lame panel. my @meetgranola was working extra hard. ✍️

top10TweetsByEngagement.author: jacobtechtavern
top10TweetsByEngagement.text: Gonna copy all these for @meetgranola and take the credit thanks lads 💅

top10TweetsByEngagement.author: mgonto
top10TweetsByEngagement.text:
Installed wacli and slacrawl into @openclaw and it's been a step up!

Now my CRM has updates from calls (via @meetgranola), from emails, from slack messages, and from WhatsApp. 

OpenClaw knows everything that's going on with me!

It's been so awesome!

top10TweetsByEngagement.author: GaddipatiHarsha
top10TweetsByEngagement.text: S/o as well some of our wonderful integration partners including @HubSpot, @salesforce, @attio, @meetgranola, @circlebackai, @otter_ai, and @FathomDotAI

top10TweetsByEngagement.author: HGBashar
top10TweetsByEngagement.text:
AI tools that are becoming impossible to ignore:

Higgsfield — cinematic AI videos inside Claude
Seedance — animate any image into motion
Grok — real time internet search with no limits
Hedra — turn any photo into a talking video
Veo 3 — Google's new video generator with sound
Udio — create full songs in seconds
Napkin AI — turn text into visuals instantly
Fellou — AI browser that works while you sleep
Granola — AI meeting notes that actually work
Dia — AI browser that replaces your whole workflow
Manus — AI agent that completes full tasks alone
Convergence — your first real AI employee
